customAttributes.description:
Whenever you gain life, each opponent loses 1 life.
1, Sacrifice another creature: Dina, Soul Steeper gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the sacrificed creature's power.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 4/21/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: Her concoctions corroded metal and fortified organic tissue. They would be studied for generations.
